name: Ola Cabs
description: India's largest ride-hailing platform offering cabs, auto-rickshaws, and bike taxis across 200+ cities
pros: Widest ride-hailing network across Indian cities including tier-2/3
Auto-rickshaw booking fills a uniquely Indian need
Indian founder Bhavish Aggarwal maintains operational control
Ola Money wallet for cashless payments
cons: SoftBank (Japan) holds ~25% stake — significant foreign ownership
Driver cancellation rates are high in many cities
Surge pricing during peak hours with limited transparency
App reliability issues — GPS tracking and ETA often inaccurate
userComplaints: Drivers cancel rides frequently, especially short-distance trips
Customer support is mostly automated with no real resolution
Surge pricing makes rides unaffordable during rain or peak hours
